response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the Japanese lyrics and English translations in the reference JSON for both 'Ride on Time' and 'CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA'. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the lyrics for accuracy; talk segments were manually transcribed and translated using visual cues and burned-in subtitles. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are tightly anchored to vocal starts; aggressive truncation was used during rapid talk segments and the pun delivery to maintain sync.

subtitles.original: Oh ride on time 時よ走り出せ
subtitles.english: Oh, ride on time, time, start running

subtitles.original: 愛よ光り出せ 目も眩むほど
subtitles.english: Love, shine so brightly that even the eyes are dazzled

subtitles.original: Oh ride on time 心に火をつけて
subtitles.english: Oh, ride on time, ignite the fire in the heart

subtitles.original: 飛び立つ魂に 贈るよ ride on time
subtitles.english: Offered to the soaring soul, ride on time

subtitles.original: Ride on time 彷徨う想いなら
subtitles.english: Ride on time, if wandering feelings

subtitles.original: 優しく受け止めて そっと包んで
subtitles.english: Gently accept and softly embrace

subtitles.original: Oh ride on time 心に火をつけて
subtitles.english: Oh, ride on time, ignite the fire in the heart

subtitles.original: 溢れる喜びに 広がれ ride on time
subtitles.english: Spread in overflowing joy, ride on time

subtitles.original: Ride on time 時よ走り出せ
subtitles.english: Ride on time, time, start running

subtitles.original: 愛よ光り出せ 目も眩むほど
subtitles.english: Love, shine so brightly that even the eyes are dazzled

subtitles.original: Ride on time 心に火をつけて
subtitles.english: Ride on time, ignite the fire in the heart

subtitles.original: You're watching Erb TV!
subtitles.english: You're watching Erb TV!

subtitles.original: I don't know how to dance...
subtitles.english: I don't know how to dance...

subtitles.original: アンビリーバボー！ここは1980年代の高校のディスコかしら！
subtitles.english: Unbelievable! Are we in a 1980s high school disco?

subtitles.original: お、ディスコディスコ！いえーいディスコ！いえーい！
subtitles.english: Oh, disco, disco! Yay, disco! Yay!

subtitles.original: この制服似合ってる？
subtitles.english: Does this uniform suit me?

subtitles.original: 最高にキュートよ！
subtitles.english: It's super cute!

subtitles.original: 二人ともとってもカワイイわ！
subtitles.english: You both look kawaii!

subtitles.original: でも本当の疑問は、世界がこの魅力に耐えられるかってことよ！
subtitles.english: But the real question is, is the world ready for such charm?

subtitles.original: 見ている人全員の心を奪っちゃったわね。私の心もね！
subtitles.english: You've captured the very heart of everyone watching, including mine!

subtitles.original: リズ、これってもしかして本物？
subtitles.english: Liz, is this mustache real?

subtitles.original: ちょっとちょっと！手を離して！
subtitles.english: Hey, hey, hey! Hands off!

subtitles.original: これは最高級のエグゾーディアンの工芸品なんだから！
subtitles.english: This here is top-tier Great Exodian craftsmanship!

subtitles.original: でもみんなに"Mustach(口髭)"な質問をさせて！
subtitles.english: But I mustache you a question!

subtitles.original: (※Must ask(聞かなきゃ)と掛けてます)
subtitles.english: (※A pun on "must ask")

subtitles.original: ころね！あなたはタフなワンちゃんだって聞いてるわ！
subtitles.english: Korone! I heard you're a tough pooch!

subtitles.original: あなたとマリンならどっちが学校の番長になるかしら？
subtitles.english: Between you and Marine, who would be the leader of the school?

subtitles.original: さあ、ころね。かかってこい！
subtitles.english: Char, Korone! Come at me!

subtitles.original: オーケー、マリン。カモン！
subtitles.english: Okay, Marine! Come on!

subtitles.original: なんてこった！やめて！やめて！やめて！
subtitles.english: What the frig? Break it off! Break it off! Break it off!

subtitles.original: レディーズ、ここは80年代よ。
subtitles.english: Ladies, this is the 80s.

subtitles.original: 物事にダンスバトルで解決しましょう！
subtitles.english: We settle things with a dance-off!

subtitles.original: ダンス？ダンスバトル！
subtitles.english: Dance? Dance-off!

subtitles.original: それじゃあ次の質問よ！
subtitles.english: Which leads me to my next question!

subtitles.original: ダンスバトルならどっちが勝つかしら？
subtitles.english: Who would win in a dance battle?

subtitles.original: さて！もっとお喋りしたいけど、私は行かなくちゃ！
subtitles.english: Anyway, anyway... I'd love to stay and chat, but I gotta dash.

subtitles.original: ころね、マリン、次の曲を紹介してくれるかしら？
subtitles.english: Korone, Marine, please lead us into the next song.

subtitles.original: よろしくね！それじゃあね！
subtitles.english: Cheers ladies, let's go!

subtitles.original: オッケー！
subtitles.english: Okay!

subtitles.original: 次の曲は何かな？
subtitles.english: Now, what's our next song?

subtitles.original: エネルギッシュな曲と聞いてますよ！
subtitles.english: I hear it's an energetic one!

subtitles.original: よし、準備はいいみたいだね！
subtitles.english: All right, it looks like everything's ready!

subtitles.original: オラに元気をわけてくれ！
subtitles.english: Lend me your energy!

subtitles.original: ハッ！
subtitles.english: Huzzah!

subtitles.original: Sparking!
subtitles.english: Sparking!

subtitles.original: 光る雲を突き抜け Fly Away (Fly Away)
subtitles.english: Piercing through the shining clouds, Fly Away (Fly Away)

subtitles.original: からだじゅうに広がるパノラマ
subtitles.english: A panorama spreading through my whole body

subtitles.original: 顔を蹴られた地球が怒って (怒って)
subtitles.english: The Earth, kicked in the face, gets angry (angry)

subtitles.original: 火山を爆発させる
subtitles.english: And makes the volcanoes explode

subtitles.original: 溶けた氷の中に
subtitles.english: Inside the melted ice

subtitles.original: 恐竜がいたら 玉乗り仕込みたいね
subtitles.english: If there were dinosaurs, I'd want to train them to balance on balls

subtitles.original: CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA
subtitles.english: CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA

subtitles.original: 何が起きても気分は へのへのカッパ
subtitles.english: No matter what happens, I'm cool as a cucumber

subtitles.original: CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA
subtitles.english: CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA

subtitles.original: 胸がパチパチするほど 騒ぐ元気玉...
subtitles.english: My chest is crackling with excitement, a roaring Spirit Bomb...
